# programs.skim

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `programs.skim`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `programs.skim.changeDirWidgetCommand` | `null or string` | The command that gets executed as the source for skim for the ALT-C keybinding. |
| `programs.skim.changeDirWidgetOptions` | `list of string` | Command line options for the ALT-C keybinding. |
| `programs.skim.defaultCommand` | `null or string` | The command that gets executed as the default source for skim when running. |
| `programs.skim.defaultOptions` | `list of string` | Extra command line options given to skim by default. |
| `programs.skim.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable skim - a command-line fuzzy finder. |
| `programs.skim.enableBashIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Bash integration. |
| `programs.skim.enableFishIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Fish integration. |
| `programs.skim.enableZshIntegration` | `boolean` | Whether to enable Zsh integration. |
| `programs.skim.fileWidgetCommand` | `null or string` | The command that gets executed as the source for skim for the CTRL-T keybinding. |
| `programs.skim.fileWidgetOptions` | `list of string` | Command line options for the CTRL-T keybinding. |
| `programs.skim.historyWidgetOptions` | `list of string` | Command line options for the CTRL-R keybinding. |
| `programs.skim.package` | `package` | The skim package to use. |
